creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
/grumbles after dirtying up his tree

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/porting-submitting.html

the instructions showed the example, "Next, build the shar(1) file. Assuming the port is called oneko, cd to the directory above where the oneko directory is located, and then type: shar `find oneko` > oneko.shar"

that provides the ports directory.  I just expanded your port into sysutils instead of sysutils/rcm.  Please take note for future contributions, thanks.
